name: FlowDock
description: Directly maps unbound (apo) protein structures to their bound (holo) counterparts for any number of binding ligands.. Among the top-5 methods for pharmacological binding affinity estimation across 140 protein-ligand complexes in CASP 16.. On the PoseBusters Benchmark dataset: Achieves a 51% blind docking success rate using only apo structures and no multiple sequence alignment information.. Matches single-sequence Chai-1 performance for binding pocket generalization on DockGen-E.
capabilities: Directly maps unbound (apo) protein structures to their bound (holo) counterparts for any number of binding ligands.
Among the top-5 methods for pharmacological binding affinity estimation across 140 protein-ligand complexes in CASP 16.
On the PoseBusters Benchmark dataset: Achieves a 51% blind docking success rate using only apo structures and no multiple sequence alignment information.
Matches single-sequence Chai-1 performance for binding pocket generalization on DockGen-E.

protein_structure.description: Apo (unbound) protein structure in PDB format

n_poses.description: Number of docking poses to generate
